title: Tenant Dockerfile does not embed ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
evidence: All 4 TC-035 tests passed in 6ms: - ✓ No non-comment line contains ANTHROPIC_API_KEY - ✓ No ENV instruction sets any API key - ✓ auth-profiles.json is not COPYd into the image - ✓ Only IMAGE_TAG ARG present (no auth ARGs) The Dockerfile has a single `ARG IMAGE_TAG=dev`, no ENV with secrets, no auth-profiles.json COPY, and an explicit comment documenting that credentials are injected at runtime via bind-mounted auth-profiles.json. Full suite: 444 passed, 8 skipped (unrelated lifecycle.test.ts EADDRINUSE failure).
